goal: Add a side-effect-free decision layer for Live AICOS cache persistence, allowing only future memory-only caching when the fetch/cache contract and network result are safe, while durable persistence remains blocked until a separate storage contract exists.
scope_out: Do not implement storage, durable cache, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, route, package changes, or workflow changes.
Do not change BPK-015 or BPK-022 semantics.
claims: Memory-only cache readiness can be decided without implementing persistence.
Durable cache remains blocked until a separate storage contract exists.
Network review or quarantine prevents cache readiness.
assumptions: A later block may build a memory-only adapter.
Durable storage needs a distinct authority and retention decision.
dod: Memory-only readiness requires cacheWriteAllowed and accepted network result.
Durable cache is blocked by explicit storage-contract requirement.
Network review yields review_required, not ready.
Focused tests, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Storage implementation, DB, filesystem cache, route, scheduler, package, workflow, or deployment changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-015 allowed cache readiness classification and BPK-022 added network fetching. BPK-025 may decide persistence posture without storing data.
